mapper.sql: id, register_id, patient_id, patient_name, category_id, category_name, item_id, item_name, item_code, quantity, unit_price, total_amount, status, pay_time, refund_time, operator_id, operator_name, remark, source_id, create_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM expense_record WHERE id = #{id} FOR UPDATE
SELECT FROM expense_record WHERE register_id = #{registerId} AND status = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM expense_record WHERE patient_id = #{patientId} AND status = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT FROM expense_record WHERE register_id = #{registerId} AND status = 0
AND id IN
#{itemId}
ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM expense_record WHERE register_id = #{registerId} AND item_code = 'MEDICATION_FEE' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM expense_record WHERE register_id = #{registerId} AND item_code = 'REGISTRATION_FEE' AND status IN (0, 1) ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM expense_record WHERE register_id = #{registerId} AND status = 0 ORDER BY create_time ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE expense_record SET status = #{status}, pay_time = #{payTime}, refund_time = #{refundTime}, operator_id = #{operatorId}, operator_name = #{operatorName}, remark = #{remark} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT pay_time::date AS "date", COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) AS "amount" FROM expense_record WHERE status = 1 AND pay_time::date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY pay_time::date
mapper.update: UPDATE expense_record SET status = 3, remark = COALESCE(remark || ' | ', '') || 'orphan-cleanup' WHERE status = 0 AND create_time < #{cutoff} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM register r WHERE r.id = expense_record.register_id )
